b:T9822,<div class="specification">
<p>The transport of oxygen around the body is essential for life.</p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>A graph showing saturation of oxygen against partial pressure of oxygen is shown.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p>Explain the shape of the graph from 0 to 50 % saturation.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Explain why carbon monoxide is very toxic and how it may be possible to treat carbon monoxide poisoning.</p>
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div>c:T6a7,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>binding of oxygen/O<sub>2</sub> «to one active site» affects shape of Hb/other active sites</p>
<p><em><strong>OR</strong></em></p>
<p>binding of one oxygen/O<sub>2</sub> «molecule» affects binding of other oxygen/O<sub>2</sub> «molecules» ✔</p>
<p> </p>
<p>increasing affinity of Hb to oxygen/O<sub>2</sub></p>
<p><em><strong>OR</strong></em></p>
<p>enhanced binding of «further» oxygen/O<sub>2</sub> «molecules»</p>
<p><em><strong>OR</strong></em></p>
<p>cooperative binding ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p><em>Toxicity:</em></p>
<p>carboxyhemoglobin/Hb–CO does not readily dissociate</p>
<p><em><strong>OR</strong></em></p>
<p>CO + Hb <span class="mjpage"><math alttext=" \rightleftharpoons " xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML">
<mo stretchy="false">⇌</mo>
</math></span> Hb–CO <em><strong>AND </strong></em>forward reaction favoured</p>
<p><em><strong>OR</strong></em></p>
<p>affinity of carbon monoxide/CO for hemoglobin is «200 times/much» higher than that of oxygen/O<sub>2</sub></p>
<p><em><strong>OR</strong></em></p>
<p>competitive inhibitor of oxygen/O<sub>2</sub> binding ✔</p>
<p> </p>
<p><em>Treatment:</em></p>
<p>moving patient to fresh air</p>
<p><em><strong>OR</strong></em></p>
<p>«in severe cases» inhaling pure oxygen/O<sub>2</sub></p>
<p><em><strong>OR</strong></em></p>
<p>high pressure oxygen/O<sub>2</sub> chamber ✔</p>
<p> </p>
<p><em>Accept “move away from carbon monoxide/CO source” <strong>OR</strong> “remove carbon monoxide/CO source”.</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/chemistry/topic/b/","children":["← back to ","Chemistry"," topic ","b"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"18N.3.HL.TZ0.11"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Chemistry"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"18N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","b-9-biological-pigments"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$c"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
